hooks.description: Run ruff format on any .py file after Claude writes to it
Run pytest for the relevant test file whenever Claude edits a module
Block rm -rf targeting project root or home directory

action.message: 🚫 Blocked: rm -rf targeting root or home directory is not allowed.

hooks.description: Warn when pip install is run without pinning a version

action.message: ⚠️ pip install without a pinned version (e.g. fastapi==0.115.0) can cause reproducibility issues. Consider pinning the version.

hooks.description: Scan staged files for hardcoded secrets before any git commit

action.command: git diff --cached | grep -iE '(api_key|secret|password|token|private_key|DATABASE_URL)\s*=\s*["\x27][^"\x27]{8,}' && echo 'SECRETS FOUND' && exit 1 || exit 0
action.blockMessage: 🔐 Potential secret detected in staged files. Use environment variables instead.

hooks.description: Run mypy on the file Claude just wrote to catch type errors early
Print a checklist reminder when the Claude Code session ends

action.command: echo '✅ Session complete. Checklist: [ ] pytest passing [ ] ruff clean [ ] mypy clean [ ] git diff reviewed [ ] PR opened'
